title: BBC Brit’s Death Valley is the twisted buddy-cop show you didn’t know you needed
description: BUSINESS NEWS - In a delightful twist on the...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - In a delightful twist on the traditional murder mystery, BBC Brit introduces Death Valley, a comedy-drama that proves that even in the shadow of death, laughter can flourish.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - In a delightful twist on the traditional murder mystery, BBC Brit introduces Death Valley, a comedy-drama that proves that even in the shadow of death, laughter can flourish."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Set against the stunningly eerie landscape of rural Wales, this series combines sharp wit with emotional depth, making it a must-watch for fans of British television."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the heart of Death Valley lies an unconventional duo, blending the quirks of a buddy-cop dynamic with vibrant character interactions.","html":"At the heart of Death Valley lies an unconventional duo, blending the quirks of a buddy-cop dynamic with vibrant character interactions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The show stars the award-winning actor and Harry Potter star Timothy Spall as John Chapel, a retired actor who has become a recluse living in rural Wales. Alongside him is the bright-eyed and keen Detective Sergeant Janie Mallowan, played by Gwyneth Keyworth, who is not only a cop but also his biggest admirer.","html":"The show stars the award-winning actor and Harry Potter star Timothy Spall as John Chapel, a retired actor who has become a recluse living in rural Wales. Alongside him is the bright-eyed and keen Detective Sergeant Janie Mallowan, played by Gwyneth Keyworth, who is not only a cop but also his biggest admirer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together, this mismatched pair embarks on a weekly journey of solving crimes while navigating their own complex personalities and relationships.","html":"Together, this mismatched pair embarks on a weekly journey of solving crimes while navigating their own complex personalities and relationships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the UK, on BBC One, Death Valley, Series 1 Episode 1 achieved the largest Overnights audience for a new BBC Scripted Comedy title in 5 years with 2.9 million.","html":"In the UK, on BBC One, Death Valley, Series 1 Episode 1 achieved the largest Overnights audience for a new BBC Scripted Comedy title in 5 years with 2.9 million."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Writer and creator Paul Doolan describes the series as “a murder mystery for people who also want to laugh and feel something.”","html":"Writer and creator Paul Doolan describes the series as “a murder mystery for people who also want to laugh and feel something.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He strikes the perfect balance between humour, mystery, and emotional storytelling, ensuring viewers are engaged from start to finish. Doolan's vision is realised through the characters’ interactions. As Spall puts it, “It’s this odd relationship where they get on each other’s nerves, but it really works.”","html":"He strikes the perfect balance between humour, mystery, and emotional storytelling, ensuring viewers are engaged from start to finish. Doolan's vision is realised through the characters’ interactions. As Spall puts it, “It’s this odd relationship where they get on each other’s nerves, but it really works.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While Death Valley echoes the clever energy of Sherlock and the warmth of Gavin & Stacey, it maintains its unique flavour, drawing viewers deeper into the heart of Welsh culture. Each episode introduces a new ensemble of characters, adding additional layers of intrigue and humour to the mix as the duo faces a rotating cast of suspects and motives.","html":"While Death Valley echoes the clever energy of Sherlock and the warmth of Gavin & Stacey, it maintains its unique flavour, drawing viewers deeper into the heart of Welsh culture. Each episode introduces a new ensemble of characters, adding additional layers of intrigue and humour to the mix as the duo faces a rotating cast of suspects and motives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This fresh take on the genre is not only about unravelling mysteries but also about emotional revelations and personal growth.","html":"This fresh take on the genre is not only about unravelling mysteries but also about emotional revelations and personal growth."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As Detective Janie grapples with her idolisation of the fictional Caesar versus the real John, the layers of their relationship peel back, revealing the complexities of hero worship and human connection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For viewers seeking something that is both sharply comedic and satisfyingly offbeat, Death Valley offers an engaging mix of tension and humour where emotional stakes rival the twists of each case.","html":"For viewers seeking something that is both sharply comedic and satisfyingly offbeat, Death Valley offers an engaging mix of tension and humour where emotional stakes rival the twists of each case."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tune in to Death Valley, airing Tuesdays at 20:00 on BBC Brit (DStv Channel 120), and prepare to find your next obsession. With its brilliantly crafted narrative and unexpected humour, you won't want to miss a moment.","html":"Tune in to Death Valley, airing Tuesdays at 20:00 on BBC Brit (DStv Channel 120), and prepare to find your next obsession. With its brilliantly crafted narrative and unexpected humour, you won't want to miss a moment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, visit BBC Studios AfricaOr, follow these social media pages:IG: @bbcstudiosafricaFacebook: BBC Lifestyle and BBC Brit AfricaX (Twitter): @BBCS_AfricaTikTok: @bbc.africa.channels","html":"For more information, visit BBC Studios Africa
Or, follow these social media pages:
IG: @bbcstudiosafrica
Facebook: BBC Lifestyle and BBC Brit Africa
X (Twitter): @BBCS_Africa
TikTok: @bbc.africa.channels"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
